name: Chick-fil-A

current_snapshot.term_headline: Specified per individual agreement (blank in template)
current_snapshot.renewal_headline: CFA has the right but not the obligation to renew. No automatic renewal right.

opening_inventory_if_cfa_supply.notes: Not due until after Licensed Unit opens. Only if CFA Supply is your distributor.

license_fee.due: Monthly by the 25th for preceding month

audit_penalty.extra: If understatement >= 5%, licensee pays all CFA audit costs

late_payment.rate: 12% per annum on amounts 30+ days overdue

advertising_fee.notes: No advertising fees or fund contributions required

tech_fee_detail.license_fee_definition_of_gross_receipts: All cash and charge sales of every kind made at or from or related to the Licensed Units except refunds to customers and meals given employees incident to their employment.
tech_fee_detail.license_fee_payment_address: Chick-fil-A, Inc., P.O. Box 208913, Dallas, TX 75320-8806
tech_fee_detail.training_fee_excludes: Travel, room, living expenses, wages, workers compensation
tech_fee_detail.audit_5pct_threshold: If understatement >= 5%, licensee pays all CFA audit costs including accounting and legal fees

contract_burden.transfer: No transfer without CFA's prior written approval. CFA has right but not obligation to approve.

noncompete_post_term.scope: At the former Licensed Site only
noncompete_post_term.restriction: No nationally or regionally branded chicken products or substantially similar products

raw.protection_scope: During License Term, CFA will not operate or license another unit from the same Site where licensee operates. No geographic, campus, or area exclusivity.
raw.encroachment_note: Legal protection is minimal (same-site only, non-exclusive license), but practical encroachment risk is moderated by the captive-venue model — a university food court CFA does not directly compete with a nearby free-standing Operator restaurant.

three_year_trends.notes: Revenue grew 42% over 2 years. Net earnings stabilized around B. Asset base grew 14.5% YoY.

key_notes: Note 1: Summary of Significant Accounting Policies — revenue recognition, lease accounting, equity investments
Note 9: Related Party Transactions — principal shareholder owns fixtures supplier (.6M in 2024); Truetts Group land leases
Note 10: Leases — massive real estate portfolio; operating lease liabilities .7B; finance lease liabilities .8B
Note 12: Health Insurance — self-insured since 2023; .3M expense in 2024
Note 14: Commitments and Contingencies — referenced but no material items noted
Note 15: Subsequent Events — none material through March 21, 2025

bankruptcy_flag.description: Pier 1 Imports, Inc. filed Chapter 11 on February 17, 2020. Pier 1 is NOT the franchisor or an affiliate. Cheryl Bachelder (CFA Board member since April 2019) served as Interim CEO of Pier 1 Dec 2018-Nov 2019. Matter still pending.
bankruptcy_flag.court: U.S. Bankruptcy Court, Eastern District of Virginia

cases.name: Stephens and Strawn v. Chick-fil-A (Data Breach)
cases.court: U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Georgia
cases.type: Data breach / PII compromise — Chick-fil-A One members (Dec 2022 - Feb 2023)
cases.claims: Negligence, breach of implied contract, negligence per se, Georgia Uniform Deceptive Trade Practices Act
cases.resolution: Settled individually (not class). $210,000 total ($2,500 per plaintiff x5, remainder to counsel). Dismissed with prejudice Dec 7, 2023.

cases.name: Mayheu / Pittman / Ukpere / Goldstein / Ortega v. Chick-fil-A (Delivery Fee)
cases.court: Superior Court of Fulton County, Georgia (consolidated)
cases.type: Delivery fee misrepresentation — higher delivery menu prices not disclosed
cases.claims: Negligent misrepresentation, violations of GA/NY/NJ/FL/CA consumer protection statutes
cases.resolution: Class action settlement approved Feb 29, 2024. $4,400,000 fund. $880K attorney fees, $15,579 costs, $5K per lead plaintiff, $29.25 per valid claimant (3,984 claims), ~$230K to Feeding America. No franchisees named.

raw.franchisee_involvement: No franchisees named as defendants in any disclosed litigation
